title: Thank you
summary:
- **Acknowledgment and Patience:** Users are thanked for their patience as STT (Speech-to-Text) and LLM (Language Model) downloads are completed.  
- **Beta Phase Information:** The service is in Beta phase, and glitches or errors may be expected. Continuous improvements are being made based on reported bugs.  
- **Features Notification:**  
  - Meeting Transcription will be available after the STT download is complete (indicated by the recording button turning red).  
  - Meeting Summarization will be available after the LLM download is complete.  
- **Resource Suggestions:** Users are encouraged to explore supporting materials like documentation, blogs, onboarding videos, and Discord to better understand the product and provide feedback.  
- **Call to Action:** Join the Discord community and share feedback with the team.
